name: aios-core
description: The AIOS core layer. A Claude Code + Obsidian operating system for Adir Sellam's clients. Onboarding, system connections, self-audit and improvement, a daily morning report, management over WhatsApp, and installing per-client vertical add-ons. Skills: /onboard (bootstrap and interview), /connect (wire Gmail/Drive/Calendar via gws), /audit (4C score and gaps), /level-up (propose the next skill to build), /morning-report (daily Hebrew brief), /supervisor (query and run the system over WhatsApp), /doctor (system health check), /install (install a vertical plugin the client received as a file). Use when the user says onboard, setup, הקמה, connect, חיבור, audit, ביקורת, level up, שדרוג, morning report, דוח בוקר, supervisor, מפקח, doctor, בדיקה, install, התקן, or runs the matching slash command.
